textPlain:
Very nice! I've found that the default iOS screen time feature is easily skippable.
Barcode scanning is an interesting real-world "lock".

I like the QR code idea a lot more than the physical devices you can buy for this. Cool concept.Did Apple recently make an API for app blocking or something? There seems to have been an explosion in apps for this over the last few years.
What is the failsafe if mom donates that book (you no longer have access to that barcode)? Are you locked out of TikTok forever? It might be good to cover this in the description somewhere.
You can just uninstall the app
